description: Triangle group for {5,4} and {4,5} tilings — Escher's Circle Limit IV group

escherRelevance.description: This group governs the symmetry of Escher's Circle Limit IV
escherRelevance.colorSymmetry: The 4-fold rotation at Q determines the 4-color scheme for angel/demon figures
escherRelevance.pattern: Angels and Demons alternate with 4-fold vertex symmetry
